title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: opencryptoki bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for opencryptoki is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The opencryptoki packages contain version 2.11 of the PKCS#11 API, implemented for IBM Cryptocards, such as IBM 4764 and 4765 crypto cards. These packages includes support for the IBM 4758 Cryptographic CoProcessor (with the PKCS#11 firmware loaded), the IBM eServer Cryptographic Accelerator (FC 4960 on IBM eServer System p), the IBM Crypto Express2 (FC 0863 or FC 0870 on IBM System z), and the IBM CP Assist for Cryptographic Function (FC 3863 on IBM System z). The opencryptoki packages also bring a software token implementation that can be used without any cryptographic hardware. These packages contain the Slot Daemon (pkcsslotd) and general utilities.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10.0.z - openCryptoki: Fix for supporting CCA 8.4 (JIRA:RHEL-105916)

full_text:
An update for opencryptoki is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The opencryptoki packages contain version 2.11 of the PKCS#11 API, implemented for IBM Cryptocards, such as IBM 4764 and 4765 crypto cards. These packages includes support for the IBM 4758 Cryptographic CoProcessor (with the PKCS#11 firmware loaded), the IBM eServer Cryptographic Accelerator (FC 4960 on IBM eServer System p), the IBM Crypto Express2 (FC 0863 or FC 0870 on IBM System z), and the IBM CP Assist for Cryptographic Function (FC 3863 on IBM System z). The opencryptoki packages also bring a software token implementation that can be used without any cryptographic hardware. These packages contain the Slot Daemon (pkcsslotd) and general utilities.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL10.0.z - openCryptoki: Fix for supporting CCA 8.4 (JIRA:RHEL-105916)
